title: ai_parse_document is now generally available
body:
The `ai_parse_document` function is now generally available. This function parses structured content from unstructured documents including PDFs, images, Word documents, and PowerPoint files. Documents are limited to a maximum of 500 pages and 100 MB. See [`ai_parse_document` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_parse_document).

`ai_parse_document` will soon be available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled.
